text:
Once upon a time in Smalltownville, there existed a peculiar duck named Gladys. Gladys was fluffy all over with a rainbow-patterned plumage. She lived in a cozy little birch tree house nestled snugly beside Whispering Woods.

Every morning Gladys sang a cheerful tune while fluttering her enormous webbed feet down from her lofty perch. Her favorite breakfast was worms, swirled with blueberries plucked fresh from Berry Patch Orchard. Her friends were turtles, mice, and rabbit pals.

One peculiar afternoon, while hopping across glittering pebbles in the streambed beneath the tree house, Gladys discovered something magical. A shimmering spiderweb hung over a hidden pool of sparkling dew. With a cautious trot, she landed on the webbing and something astonishing happened—the stars began to twinkle brighter!

Gladys watched in awe as these twinkling gems danced around her. They seemed to whisper secrets about the stars above. Just then, a sparkle whispered back about
